metadata.title: Team9.ai — Best AI Agent Team for Real Work
metadata.ogTitle: Team9.ai — Best AI Agent Team for Real Work
metadata.description: Team9.ai turns AI agents into a dependable execution team for product, engineering, and operations work. Assign outcomes, track progress, reuse playbooks, and keep every agent accountable in one workspace.
metadata.ogDescription: Team9.ai turns AI agents into a dependable execution team for product, engineering, and operations work.
metadata.pricingDescription: Choose the perfect plan for your team. From free for organizations to enterprise solutions with dedicated support.

hero.subheadline: Team9.ai turns AI agents into a dependable execution team for product, engineering, and operations work. Assign outcomes, track progress, reuse playbooks, and keep every agent accountable in one workspace.
hero.videoAriaLabel: Team9.ai board view showing humans and agents coordinating work

features.agentTeamHeadline:
Assign real work to agents,
not just prompts
features.agentTeamDescription: Team9.ai gives each agent a role, context, owner, and operating lane. They pick up work, report progress, ask for help, and leave a trail your team can trust.
features.agentTeamImageAlt: AI staff roster showing role-based agents for engineering, growth, support, research, QA, and ops
features.agentTeamCard1Desc: Create agents for engineering, growth, support, research, QA, and ops. Each one knows what it owns and how to work with your team.
features.agentTeamCard2Desc: Every update, blocker, decision, and handoff stays visible in one shared timeline.
features.agentTeamCard3Desc: Humans and agents work from one queue, so priorities stay clear and nothing disappears into a chat thread.
features.realWorkDescription: Team9.ai manages the full execution loop: plan, start, inspect, escalate, finish, and summarize. Agents keep moving while people stay in control.
features.realWorkImageAlt: Task list view with agents working on scoped items, showing status and owners
features.realWorkCard1Desc: Break big requests into scoped tasks with owners, status, dependencies, and a definition of done.
features.realWorkCard2Desc: When an agent hits missing context, a broken environment, or a risky decision, it raises the issue instead of guessing.
features.realWorkCard3Desc: Watch work unfold in real time, review the trail later, and step in only when a human decision is needed.
features.playbooksHeadline:
Turn repeatable work
into team playbooks
features.playbooksDescription: Team9.ai captures the way your team ships: launch checklists, bug triage, PR review, customer research, reporting, and handoffs. Reuse the best workflow every time.
features.playbooksImageAlt: Playbook library showing reusable workflows for launches, triage, and reporting
features.playbooksCard1Desc: Codify the instructions, examples, files, tools, and decision rules that make an agent effective.
features.playbooksCard2Desc: A playbook written once becomes available to every agent and every teammate.
features.playbooksCard3Desc: The more your team works, the stronger the operating system becomes.
features.controlRoomHeadline:
One control room
for your AI workforce
features.controlRoomDescription: See who is working, what is queued, where compute is running, and which outcomes are at risk. Team9.ai keeps the whole agent team observable.
features.controlRoomImageAlt: Agent settings dashboard with usage, permissions, and health indicators
features.controlRoomCard1Desc: Track local and cloud agents, work queues, owners, and status from one command center.
features.controlRoomCard2Desc: Usage, latency, errors, cost, and activity stay visible so your team can trust the system.
features.controlRoomCard3Desc: Coordinate coding agents, research agents, workflow automation, and internal systems without forcing a new operating model.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Start with the outcomes your team already owns: product work, engineering tasks, customer operations, research, and internal workflows.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Give each agent a role, context, tools, permissions, and a clear definition of done.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Route tasks to the right agent or teammate, keep status visible, and review progress in one place.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Turn successful runs into playbooks so the next task starts with better instructions, sharper context, and fewer handoffs.

builtFor.description: Team9.ai is the workspace for companies that want AI agents to do accountable work, not just generate answers. It keeps people, agents, context, and outcomes in sync.
builtFor.card1Desc: Use agents for shipping, analysis, support, QA, growth, documentation, and back-office workflows.
builtFor.card2Desc: Set guardrails, approve risky steps, inspect decisions, and keep final ownership with the team.
builtFor.card3Desc: Every task, note, file, decision, and lesson becomes reusable team memory.
builtFor.card4Desc: Bring the models, tools, and runtimes that fit your company. Team9.ai coordinates the work layer.

faq.headline: Questions & answers.
faq.a1: Team9.ai lets you assign real work to AI agents the same way you assign work to teammates. Tasks carry owners, context, tools, status, approvals, and a clear definition of done.
faq.q2: Which models can I run inside Team9.ai?
faq.a2: Team9.ai works with leading models including Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and GLM 5.1. You can mix models by role instead of forcing one model to do every job.
faq.q3: How is this different from ChatGPT or Claude?
faq.a3: Chat is for one-off conversations. Team9.ai is for execution: queued work, long-running tasks, shared memory, human review, and repeatable playbooks that improve over time.
faq.q4: Can humans approve or step in before something ships?
faq.a4: Yes. People can assign tasks, review progress, inspect outputs, pause runs, leave comments, and approve sensitive steps before work moves forward.
faq.q5: What kind of work fits best?
faq.a5: Engineering, research, operations, support, QA, documentation, reporting, and other repeatable workflows where ownership, visibility, and follow-through matter.
faq.q6: Do I need to replace my current tools?
faq.a6: No. Team9.ai is the coordination layer. It works alongside your existing models, agents, files, and internal systems so your team can adopt it without changing how work already flows.

footer.tagline: Best AI Agent Team for Real Work. Build, run, and improve an accountable team of AI agents in one workspace.
